title: RefactorBench Multi-File Evaluation
description: Evaluate multi-file refactoring operations generated by coding agents. Annotators assess whether refactorings preserve behavior, identify the types of refactoring applied, rate code improvement, and provide detailed review comments.
citation: @inproceedings{gautam2025refactorbench, title={RefactorBench: Evaluating Stateful Reasoning in Language Agents Through Code}, author={Dhruv Gautam and Spandan Garg and Jinu Jang and Neel Sundaresan and Roshanak Zilouchian Moghaddam}, booktitle={International Conference on Learning Representations (ICLR)}, year={2025}}
